text:
<%me>！
東京エリアの探索は進んでる？

ちゃんと進めてるって？
ウソおっしゃい！
ちゃんと働かないと、ダメよ！

というわけで、お姉さんが
モニターしててあげるから
東京エリアへゴーよ！

当たり前だけど
Ｓランクク

<%me>!
How is your exploration of Tokyo going?

It's "going"? Don't you try to lie to me!
You've completely blown it off, haven't you!?

Very well. If you truly require my watchful
eyes upon you to get anything done, I will
oblige. Now hurry and get yourself to Tokyo!

And naturally, I won't accept anything
less than an S Rank to consider your
mission complete!
